history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be fatal. The safe path toward the goal appears to go downward first, so I should turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe, while the lava at row 02 column C is to my right and should be avoided. Moving forward advances me toward the lower opening that can lead to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe, so continuing forward keeps me on the open path toward the lower route to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so I should continue moving forward toward the open corridor below.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe, and moving forward continues toward the bottom passage that can lead around the lava walls and toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I must not move forward. To reach the open area and eventually the goal, I should turn right to face the safe corridor to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left, with a wall directly ahead at column A. Turning right would face me down toward lava, and turning left would face me up toward a safe path. I should turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so moving forward is unsafe. Turning left would face me right toward the open corridor, which is safe and leads toward the goal area.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing right. Moving forward would take me into row 06 column C, which is safe and continues along the corridor toward the goal at row 08 column H. 
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column C facing right. The cell ahead at row 06 column D is safe, so I should continue forward along the open corridor toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column D facing right. The next safe cell is row 06 column E, so I should keep moving forward toward the open path that leads to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column E facing right. The next cell row 06 column F is safe, and moving forward continues along the corridor toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column F facing right. The cell ahead at row 06 column G is safe, and continuing forward keeps me moving along the open path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column G facing right. The next cell row 06 column H is safe, and moving forward continues me toward the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing right. The cell ahead at row 06 column I is a wall, so I cannot move forward. The goal is below me toward column H, so I should turn right to face down and then move toward row 08.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column H facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column H is safe, and moving forward gets me closer to the goal at row 08 column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column H facing down. The cell ahead at row 08 column H is the goal and is safe to enter, so I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
